Headline: #95 95th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 95th/Calumet
ShortDescription: Eastbound #95 95th buses are rerouted via 95th, King Drive, 87th, Cottage Grove & 93rd, then resume their normal route due to police activity near 95th/Calumet.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Eastbound #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 95th, King Drive, 87th, Cottage Grove and 93rd, then resume their normal route.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near 95th/Calumet.

Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd Street Beach
